title: Mediconnect
tagline: Doctor appointment booking with real-time availability
description: A healthcare app for booking doctor appointments and call support based on live availability, with nearby hospital recommendations powered by location services.

title: Study With AI
tagline: Turn any PDF into flashcards, quizzes, and MCQs
description: An AI-powered study tool that converts PDF or raw text into flashcards, MCQs, and quizzes, complete with an auto-evaluation system for practice tests.

title: Agro AI
tagline: Plant disease detection from a photo
description: Detects plant diseases from images and suggests treatments, integrating nearby store recommendations for the medicines needed to treat them.

title: FarmSense AI
tagline: Crop disease detection for Google Solution Challenge (SDG 2)
description: A Flutter app built for the Google Solution Challenge that uses Gemini Vision and Firebase to identify crop diseases and support farmers with actionable guidance.

title: CalorieSense AI
tagline: Food nutrition tracking for Google Solution Challenge (SDG 3)
description: A nutrition-tracking Flutter app built for the Google Solution Challenge, using the Groq API and Supabase to log meals and estimate nutritional content from photos.

title: NutriLens AI
description: A full-stack nutrition tracker that reads meals from photos using Gemini Vision, with a FastAPI backend, React front end, and Supabase for storage and auth.

title: CineSense
tagline: Movie recommendations with a Netflix-style UI
description: A movie recommendation engine using TF-IDF and cosine similarity over a curated dataset, wrapped in a dark, Netflix-inspired React interface with a FastAPI backend.

title: AI Fake News Detection System
tagline: Classifying news credibility in real time
description: A full-stack app that classifies news articles as credible or misleading using scikit-learn, with a React front end, FastAPI backend, MongoDB, and JWT authentication.
